description: Detailed vCluster monitoring across shared and private node types. Uses vcluster identity labels enriched at ingest time by OTel collectors — no PromQL joins needed.

targets.expr: histogram_quantile(0.95, sum by (le, verb) (rate(apiserver_request_duration_seconds_bucket{vcluster_name=~"$vcluster", vcluster_project=~"$project", verb!~"WATCH|CONNECT", cluster=~"$cluster"}[5m])))

sum by (vcluster_virtual_namespace) (rate(container_cpu_usage_seconds_total{vcluster_name=~"$vcluster", vcluster_project=~"$project", vcluster_virtual_namespace!="", container!="", cluster=~"$cluster"}[5m]))

topk(15, sum by (vcluster_virtual_pod) (rate(container_cpu_usage_seconds_total{vcluster_name=~"$vcluster", vcluster_project=~"$project", vcluster_virtual_pod!="", container!="", cluster=~"$cluster"}[5m])))

sum by (vcluster_virtual_pod) (rate(container_cpu_cfs_throttled_periods_total{vcluster_name=~"$vcluster", vcluster_project=~"$project", vcluster_virtual_pod!="", cluster=~"$cluster"}[5m])) / sum by (vcluster_virtual_pod) (rate(container_cpu_cfs_periods_total{vcluster_name=~"$vcluster", vcluster_project=~"$project", vcluster_virtual_pod!="", cluster=~"$cluster"}[5m])) > 0
sum by (vcluster_virtual_namespace) (container_memory_working_set_bytes{vcluster_name=~"$vcluster", vcluster_project=~"$project", vcluster_virtual_namespace!="", container!="", cluster=~"$cluster"})
topk(15, sum by (vcluster_virtual_pod) (container_memory_working_set_bytes{vcluster_name=~"$vcluster", vcluster_project=~"$project", vcluster_virtual_pod!="", container!="", cluster=~"$cluster"}))
topk(15, sum by (vcluster_virtual_pod) (container_memory_rss{vcluster_name=~"$vcluster", vcluster_project=~"$project", vcluster_virtual_pod!="", container!="", cluster=~"$cluster"}))
topk(10, sum by (vcluster_virtual_pod) (rate(container_network_receive_bytes_total{vcluster_name=~"$vcluster", vcluster_project=~"$project", vcluster_virtual_pod!="", cluster=~"$cluster"}[5m])))
topk(10, sum by (vcluster_virtual_pod) (rate(container_network_transmit_bytes_total{vcluster_name=~"$vcluster", vcluster_project=~"$project", vcluster_virtual_pod!="", cluster=~"$cluster"}[5m])))
topk(10, sum by (vcluster_virtual_pod) (rate(container_fs_reads_bytes_total{vcluster_name=~"$vcluster", vcluster_project=~"$project", vcluster_virtual_pod!="", cluster=~"$cluster"}[5m])))
topk(10, sum by (vcluster_virtual_pod) (rate(container_fs_writes_bytes_total{vcluster_name=~"$vcluster", vcluster_project=~"$project", vcluster_virtual_pod!="", cluster=~"$cluster"}[5m])))

panels.description: Node-level filesystem usage and limits. Only available for private-node vClusters — shared-node vClusters do not emit these metrics.
panels.title: Filesystem Usage vs Limit

title: vCluster / vClusters
